ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "former_region" TEXT /* Former name of the region, if applicable */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Area size of the region in square kilometers */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural, metropolitan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., Population, Total (Number)) */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the variable measurement */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the variable measurement */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the variable (e.g., demographic, economic, health) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_source ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the age group */,
  "age_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Total, 0 to 4, 5 to 9) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "variable_id" TEXT /* ID of the variable measured */,
  "age_group_id" TEXT /* ID of the age group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_source ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the history belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "previous_value" INTEGER /* Previous value of the data before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
